calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiffs' failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Lois Jones CSR# 3689 (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-20-2009 Continued To Sep-23-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiffs Maria Fernandez and Francisco Fernandez appeared in Propria Persona. The OSC is re-set to 9/23/2009 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Lois Jones CSR# 3689 (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2009 Continued To May-20-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2009 Continued To Apr-08-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiffs in Propria Persona are sanctioned $250.00 each for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 4/08/2009 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Karen Farnsworth, CSR# 5162 (212)
